title: AP Exclusive: Inside Israel's push to clear sea munitions, part of global push to protect waters
description: Israel has launched a project aimed at clearing part of the seas to give beach space back to the population. The Associated Press was granted an inside look at the initiative, which coincides with a global push to better protect the world’s waters as demand to use the seas and oceans for shipping, energy and recreation increases. Munitions can be dumped into waters after wars, fall into seas during conflict or accumulate in areas used as firing ranges. The munitions can erode and cause contamination, and unexploded ordnance can wash up on shore endangering the population. Experts say the clearance of underwater munitions has received more attention in recent years in part due to the boom in artificial intelligence, which requires millions of miles of underwater fiber-optic cables.

title: After startups, Centre to subsidize AI chips for government bodies
description: The government is preparing to extend at-scale subsidized access to artificial intelligence chips beyond startups to government departments, research agencies and state-backed colleges, in a move aimed at accelerating the development of indigenous AI models and applications
content: Another internal memorandum within the Department of Telecommunications (DoT), also reviewed by Mint, shows that the Centre for Development of Telematics (C-DOT) and Bharat Sanchar Nigam Ltd (BSNL) have been asked to submit their GPU requirements. Go... [5362 chars]

title: AI must remain a tool, not become the decision
description: Delivering the BG Deshmukh Lecture 2026 at the India International Centre on the theme 'Governance in the Age of Artificial Intelligence', Kumar argued that while AI would dramatically improve the speed and efficiency of governance, it should never replace accountability, ethics and human oversight.
content:
Advertisement

title: Asha Sharma has been appointed to a Federal Reserve task force about “Productivity and Jobs.”
description:
The Xbox CEO, who announced mass layoffs at Xbox this week, will assess “the economic impact of new general-purpose technologies, including artificial intelligence, to inform the Federal Reserve’s policy judgments.”
She’ll work alongside Marc Andreessen, cofounder of Andreessen Horowitz, and Charles I. Jones, a Stanford professor who is “on leave” at Anthropic.
[Link: Federal Reserve announces the leadership and objectives of its task forces to advance the conduct of monetary policy | https://www.federalreserve.gov/newsevents/pressreleases/monetary20260709a.htm | Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System]

title: New Fed task force members share Chairman Kevin Warsh's embrace of AI
description: The three members of a task force advising the Fed on artificial intelligence are strong proponents of the technology.
